resume_text:
ABDULLAH JAWAID 
Gulshan e Iqbal, block 2, Karachi, 75300 | +92 334 3664340 | abdullahjawaid@hotmail.com  
Summary Statement 
 Initiative-taking Electrical Engineer with 10+ years of experience excelling in electrical design, project 
management, and Installation, Testing & Commissioning. Proven record in team engagement, 
equipment procurement, and project execution. Effective communicator with expertise in handling 
contractors, vendors, and clients. Proficient in progress reporting and adept at ensuring project success 
through meticulous diligence and efficient procedures. 
Project Based Experience  
 Testing & Pre-Commissioning Lead  | E-House for DS03 Electrical Power Upgrade at CPS4  for 
Rumaila Operating Organization (ROO) – Iraq | May-Jul 2024  
 Achievements:  
 Thoroughly conducted internal testing of ABB ZS1 6.6kV Switchboard (16 panels), including 
motor and transformer feeders, EATON 400V switchboard, Chloride DC UPS 60A, F&G 
system, and auxiliary systems. 
 Successfully led the integrated Factory Acceptance Test (iFAT) with the customer for the entire 
E-house, receiving appreciation for its successful completion. 
 
 Project Lead  | LV Switchboard & Soft Starter Panels for AVINA Clean Hydrogen Inc. – USA | 
Apr-Present 2024  
 Achievements:  
 Leading the sourcing and design validation of ABB ReliaGear Switchboard and standalone 
PSTX series soft starters. 
 Ensuring technical compliance and meeting tight deadlines by offering fast delivery products. 
 
 Commissioning Lead  | E-house Commissioning Services at Basrah Natural Gas Liquefaction Plant 
(BNGL), Basrah Gas Company (BGC) – Iraq | Mar-Apr 2023 & Jan-Apr 2024  
 Achievements:  
 Managed multiple vendors and clients from technical, commercial and administrative aspects to 
execute Site Acceptance Tests, pre-commissioning, and commissioning of 4 E-houses.  
 Provided technical support for first solo/load runs of the medium and low voltage motors and 
troubleshooting throughout the project execution. 
 Enhanced my role by conducting mechanical inspections, interlock checks, and making logic 
modifications to the switchgear, all to accommodate customer budget constraints. 
 
 Installation Supervisor  | Casting of Cast Resin Sandwich Bus ducts – 4000 A –  KM500 Gas 
Treatment Plant (Pearl Petroleum) – Kurdistan Region of Iraq | Jan 2024  
 Achievements:  
 Effectively supervised the casting of Cast Resin Sandwich Bus ducts rated at 4000 A.  
 Displayed my adaptability by taking on challenges and self-training to meet and exceed 
customer requirements. 2  
 Commissioning Lead  | ABB E-house Commissioning Services at Basrah Natural Gas Liquefaction 
Plant (BNGL), Basrah Gas Company (BGC) – Iraq  3 Nos. Substations | May – Dec 2023  
 Achievements:  
 Managed multiple vendors and clients from technical, commercial and administrative aspects to 
execute Site Acceptance Tests, pre-commissioning, and commissioning of 3 ABB E-houses.  
 Provided technical support for site modifications as per customer requirements. 
 
 Electrical Lead  | Frontier Works Organization 10,000 cubic meter / day SWRO Plant, Karachi – 
Karachi Nuclear Power Plant |  Apr 2019 – Jan 2023  
 Achievements:  
 Single handedly managed multiple vendors and clients from technical, commercial, and 
administrative aspects throughout the design, procurement, installation, testing and 
commissioning phases of the project. 
 Eyed for details to follow stringent nuclear facility requirements such as sourcing of scarcely 
available Class 1E category power cables. 
 Used my negotiation skills to close out the procurement within budget and ensured deliveries 
ahead of schedule. 
 
 Electrical Engineer  | 8.2 MW 18V32 HFO Engine (used) with Switchgear System Engineering 
Review, Procurement, Installation & Commissioning – National Refinery Limited (NRL), Karachi | 
2017 – 2018.  
 Achievements:  
 Supported team in the design, procurement and installation commissioning.  
 
 Electrical Engineer  | Implementation of Yokogawa DCS in Lube Refinery – NRL | 2017 – 2018 
 Achievements:  
 Successfully devised conceptual circuit for MCC operation from DCS, approved by Yokogawa 
engineering team and implemented. 
 Enhanced site grounding system to follow Yokogawa requirement. 
 
 Project Lead  | Electrical System Upgrade of 4 MW 12V32 HFO Engine (Wartsila) – NRL | 2016 – 
2018 
 Achievements:  
 Studied existing system and presented to Wartsila team to integrate new system with old system. 
 
 Electrical Engineer  | Replacement of 7.5 MW Steam Turbine, Control System Upgrade, and 
Overhauling of Alternator – NRL | 2015 – 2017.  
 Achievements:  
 Took charge of the project midway to address engineering challenges related to synchronization, 
load sharing, and integrating with the existing system. 
 
 3  Electrical Engineer  | Revamp of Crude Distillation Unit – NRL | 2015 – 2016  
 Achievements:  
 Reviewed FEED documents and ensured project compliance according to the design. 
 
 Trainee – Senior Management  | National Refinery Limited  (NRL) | 2014 – 2015  
 Achievements:  
 Demonstrated active involvement in troubleshooting in different process areas including power 
generation. Was awarded with outstanding appraisal during this period. 
 
 Trainee Engineer  | Installation of Vertical Cement Mills - Lucky Cement Limited  | 2014 
 Achievements:  
 Effectively worked on switchgear protection relay testing and power cables testing. 
Education  
Master of Engineering Management (Industrial Management)  | NED university of engineering and 
technology, Karachi, Pakistan | 2015 – 2016  
Bachelor of Engineering (Electrical)  | NED university of engineering and technology, Karachi, Pakistan 
| 2010 – 2013  
Skills & Abilities  
Certifications  
 Cast Resin Bus duct Installation and Maintenance | Virtual Training by LINKK | Dec 2023 
 Professional Engineer (Electrical Engineer) | ANZSCO Skill Level 1| Engineers Australia | Dec 2022 
 O&M of 3500 Vibration Monitoring & Protection | Bentley Nevada | Lahore 2018 
 Centum VP R6 (Maintenance, Engineering & PRM) | Yokogawa | Singapore 2017 
 Advanced Power System Protection (ETAP) | NED University | Karachi 2013 
Expertise  
 
 Electrical Design Evaluation 
(FEED)  Project Management  Contractors / Vendors 
Managing 
 Team Engagement  Equipment Procurement / 
Sourcing  Communication Skills 
 Installation, Testing & 
Commissioning  Conducting FAT / SAT  Project Costing and 
budgeting 
 Functional Safety  Preparation of Work 
Instructions and Procedures  Progress Reporting during 
all stages of Project 4  
Executed Tasks  
 Leading Electrical Systems E-house projects including design of Single Line Diagram, design / 
review / selection MV & LV panels, cable sizing and cable routing, selection of transformers, 
selection of UPS, Fire Alarm System, and earthling system. 
 Managing Installation, Testing and Commissioning of E-houses 
 Planning project baselines 
 Performing design reviews/evaluation including power system studies & presenting it to client for 
approval 
 Conducting procurement of project material such as HV/LV components (XLPE Cables, Switchgear, 
Transformers, Power Factor & Reactors, Lighting System, Earthling /Grounding) 
 Managing multiple stakeholders including consultants, joint-venture partners, national & international 
vendors, and contractors to satisfy client’s requirements. 
 Aligning across functions tasks 
 Initiating and leading activity/job planning sessions. 
 Conducting FAT/SAT and Supervising & assisting Installation, Testing & Commissioning of 
Electrical Equipment 
 Managing all incoming & outgoing documentation 
 Monitoring & Controlling project baselines and keeping track of Project Status 
 Conducting project closeout 
Experience  
 Senior Design & Application Engineer | Intech Process Automation, Pakistan 
(https://www.intechww.com/ ) | Jan 2023 – Present  
 Senior Deputy Manager | Frontier Works Organization, Pakistan ( https://www.fwo.com.pk/ ) | 
Apr 2019 – Jan 2023 
 Project Engineer | National Refinery Limited (NRL), Pakistan ( http://www.nrlpak.com/ ) | Oct 2014 
– Apr 2019  
 Trainee Engineer | Lucky Cement Limited, Pakistan ( https://www.lucky-cement.com/ ) | Jun 2014 – 
Oct 2014

resume_text:
Team Lead  
 Experience Required:  10 to 15 years of relevant experience.  
 Basic Salary Range:  401,000 to 500,000.  
 Key Responsibilities:  
o Lead the overall engineering department and its strategic initiatives.  
o Coordinate all project elements, including design, quality planning, and installation.  
o Ensure efficient resource allocation and project success.  
o Foster a collaborative and innovative work environment.  
o Provide strategic direction and guidance to teams.  
 Key Skills:  
o Strong business acumen and strategic thinking.  
o Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.  
o Extensive experience in team management.  
 Eligibility:  Bachelor's or Master's degree in electrical engineering. A Master’s degree in 
management is preferable.

engineering is preferred.

resume_text:
Once upon a mango, there was a flying giraffe named Gerald who loved to juggle pineapples while whistling classical symphonies. Gerald lived in a bustling city called Whimsyville, where the clouds were made of cotton candy and rainbows were frequent visitors. Every Tuesday, the townsfolk gathered in the central plaza to watch Gerald's spectacular juggling act, accompanied by a chorus of singing squirrels.

One day, a mysterious stranger wearing a top hat and roller skates arrived in Whimsyville, carrying an invitation to the Grand Galactic Juggling Tournament. Gerald, excited by the prospect of showcasing his talents on an interstellar stage, accepted the challenge without hesitation.

Armed with nothing but his trusty pineapple arsenal and an unwavering sense of curiosity, Gerald embarked on a journey across the cosmos. He encountered all manner of peculiar beings: the grumpy Martian mathematician who only spoke in riddles, the melancholic Venusian poet who recited odes to lost moons, and the jovial Saturnian chef famous for his asteroid soufflés.

As the tournament began, Gerald found himself juggling alongside a fluorescent octopus, a three-eyed zebra, and a levitating magician with a penchant for disappearing acts. The audience was a sea of extraterrestrial faces, all spellbound by the kaleidoscope of spinning fruits and acrobatics.

In the end, it was Gerald's unique blend of gravity-defying grace and musical wit that won the hearts of the galaxy. He was crowned the Intergalactic Juggling Champion and awarded a lifetime supply of stardust sprinkles.

Returning to Whimsyville, Gerald regaled the townsfolk with tales of his cosmic adventure. Inspired by his courage and creativity, they celebrated with a grand festival, where even the clouds danced in jubilation.

And so, the flying giraffe named Gerald continued to defy limits, reminding everyone that in a world as whimsical as theirs, even the wildest of dreams could take flight.

resume_text:
Sure! Here's a story:

In the bustling city of Lumina, where every street glowed with the soft hum of neon lights, there was a peculiar little shop tucked away in an alley that most people never noticed. The sign above the door read "The Curiosity Corner," in elegantly fading script. Inside, the shelves were lined with oddities from around the world: a clock that ticked backwards, a stone said to have been touched by the moon, and a jar purported to contain the whisper of a forgotten wind.

One chilly evening, a young woman named Elara wandered into the shop, searching for something she couldn't quite name. Her eyes were drawn to a dusty book at the back of the store. The cover was leather, soft and worn, with gilded letters reading "The Book of Ephemera."

Curious, Elara opened the book to find its pages blank. She frowned and flipped through, only to discover that as she did, words began to appear. They told of a journey, a quest that called out to whoever read them. Entranced, Elara felt a gentle tug, as if the book were inviting her to step into its world.

Moments later, the shopkeeper, an elderly man with twinkling eyes, approached her. "Ah, you've found it," he said with a knowing smile. "That book seeks a traveler, one who can weave its tales into reality."

Elara hesitated, but the promise of adventure, of mystery beyond the ordinary, was too enticing. She nodded and the shopkeeper placed a small brass key in her hand. "For doors unseen," he whispered.

And so, with the book in her grasp and the key in her pocket, Elara stepped out into the luminescent night, not yet knowing where her footsteps would lead her, but certain that her life was about to change in the most wondrous of ways.

Once upon a zibbleflock in the middle of Flarnwood forest, a group of gleebles gathered for their annual shmorglefest. Twinkling lights dangled from the sky, orbs of snurp floated around, and the air was filled with the scent of freshly baked crinklepies. As the gleebles danced to the rhythm of the gorshnar's lute, a peculiar creature named Snizzlefritz decided it was time to introduce the wobbleflange. "To glork or not to glork," he mused, contemplating the froblyplop recipe he had been perfecting for weeks.

Meanwhile, in the heart of downtown Glenville, residents were abuzz with the latest scoop: "Giant Rubber Duck Lands in Central Fountain – Chaos Ensues!" The scene was rather quackers, as children and adults alike took turns climbing aboard the enormous floating bird, each capturing endless selfies and feeding it imaginary breadcrumbs.

In tech world news, the much-anticipated unveiling of the NanoFusion X12 chipset was marked by a display of pyrotechnics and augmented reality demos. Experts predict it will revolutionize gadget performance, enabling faster data transfer and unparalleled energy efficiency. "Think of it as the quantum leap we've been waiting for," said Dr. Alisha Tran, head of development, while unveiling the prototype, which glowed faintly with a soft cerulean hue.

And now, over at the local coffee shop, a fleeting exchange between two regulars:

Alex: "Did you see the moon last night? Looked like a giant cheese wheel."
Jordan: "Yeah, but did you taste it? Totally gouda-worthy."
Alex: "Oh, for sure. You could say it was out of this world."
Jordan: "Well, I guess you could... any plans after this?"
Alex: "Might head over to the library, hear there's a talk on interstellar cheesecake."
Jordan: "Sweet! Mind if I tag along? Didn’t know stars were made of cream filling."

Lastly, some random numbers and letters: 4729-GFJKL-9812-KDHSJ. Remember to keep laughing, keep dreaming, and always embrace the wonder of the unexpected.

resume_text:
Glip glop went the zoogleberries as they danced on the moonlit surface of the shimmering Biscon Sea. Meanwhile, in the bustling city of Xyphoria, the annual Turnip Festival was in full swing. The air was filled with the aroma of roasted turnips and the sound of folk music played by the notorious band, The Radish Rhapsodists.

In a corner of the festival, beneath the vibrant canopy of an orange and purple tent, two friends, Lila and Fynn, sat on wooden stools sipping their favorite brew, Turnip Tipple.

"Did you hear about the great blorg fiasco in Sector 7?" Fynn asked, adjusting his plaid cap.

"No, what happened?" Lila replied, her curiosity piqued.

"Apparently, a shipment of giggleberries got mixed in with the blorgs, and now half the sector is bouncing around like they're on trampolines," Fynn explained, gesturing wildly.

Lila chuckled. "Oh, the chaos! Imagine if they had mixed in snorfleberries instead—those would have turned everyone a shade of polka-dot blue!"

Just then, the sky lit up with a dazzling display of fireworks, painting abstract patterns across the stars. The crowd oohed and aahed, mesmerized by the flickering specter of colors.

As the final firework boomed and faded away, a hush fell over the festival grounds, echoing a sense of wonder. Lila and Fynn savored the moment, knowing that despite the absurdities of life—blorgs, snorfleberries, and all—they wouldn't trade this wacky world for anything.

In the small, picturesque town of Lindenbrooke, where the hummingbirds danced like fairies in the morning light, there was a peculiar little shop nestled between the bakery and the old library. It was known as "Elspeth's Curiosity Emporium," a place filled with oddities and wonders from distant lands. The air inside was thick with the scent of aged parchment and incense, punctuated by the soft ticking of countless clocks that adorned the walls.

Elspeth, the enigmatic shopkeeper with a penchant for the mystical, was known to spin tales as captivating as her inventory. It was said she possessed an ancient map marking the location of a hidden realm, accessible only during the autumn equinox. Curious visitors would often flock to the shop, hoping to catch a glimpse of this fabled parchment, though few ever succeeded.

Meanwhile, outside the shop, a parade of stray cats elegantly prowled the cobblestone streets, their eyes gleaming with the secrets of the town. The clock tower chimed seven times, casting long shadows over the square, as the townsfolk bustled about, each lost in their own stories, weaving the rich tapestry of life in Lindenbrooke.

resume_text:
Once upon a tuna, a walrus and a troubadour danced a tango on a trampoline. Suddenly, a kaleidoscope of butterflies serenaded a rainbow-colored mongoose with a ukulele. Meanwhile, the sun decided to paint the sky with polka dots, and the clouds giggled in fluffy applause.

In the midst of this nonsensical reverie, Quantum Bob and Parallel Sue discussed the feasibility of time-traveling toast. "If bread can be buttered in a different dimension," mused Quantum Bob, "think of the marmalade possibilities!" Parallel Sue nodded sagely, adjusting her holographic glasses, and remarked, "Indeed, the future is crumby, yet delicious."

Elsewhere in a technicolor forest, a digital squirrel ordered espresso from a quantum cafe, while a holographic hedgehog broadcast a podcast about existential porridge. Their listeners, the pixelated pidgeons, found the conversation riveting and tweeted their reviews in 8-bit song.

Meanwhile, the giraffes on stilts and the platypus in plaid debated the merits of narwhal naval navigation and pondered the philosophical implications of donut-shaped planets. And so, in this world where logic took a holiday, everything made perfect sense—at least until the next commercial break, when reality would resume its regularly scheduled programming.

resume_text:
Sure! Here's a random piece:

Underneath the glowing canopy of stars, two shadows met at the edge of the clearing. 

"Do you think it sees us?" Lydia whispered, barely daring to breathe. 

Marcus adjusted his glasses, squinting through the darkness. "It better not. We’ve been careful enough."

A soft, rustling breeze carried the scent of pine and something else, something old. In the distance, they could hear the distant hoot of an owl, punctuating the silence like a question mark left hanging in the night.

"The Guide said it was friendly, right?" Lydia persisted, doubt tingling in her voice.

"Well, it said it's one of the friendlier ones. But they've got a curious nature about them. Cautious but not hostile," Marcus replied, flicking through the pages of a worn-out guidebook titled "Mystical Entities of the Northern Woods."

As if on cue, a pair of luminous eyes blinked open from the shadows, reflecting the starlight. Lydia's heart skipped a beat, her fingers tightening around Marcus's sleeve.

"I think it's our chance," Marcus murmured, then slowly stepped forward, offering an open hand with a piece of granola.

The creature emerged, its fur shimmering with ethereal light, a blend of silver and midnight. It sniffed the air, then, with deliberate grace, approached them.

"So... any regrets?" Marcus asked, his voice low and wondrous.

Lydia shook her head, eyes locked on the creature. "None at all," she replied, and for a second, everything felt timeless.

As the sky began to tint with the first hues of dawn, one could imagine this was a tale they’d tell for generations – of the night they met the guardian of the forest and realized some mysteries were meant to be lived, not just discovered.

"The Guide said it was friendly, right?" Lydia persisted, doubt tingling in her voice.

"Well, it said it's one of the friendlier ones. But they've got a curious nature about them. Cautious but not hostile," Marcus replied, flicking through the pages of a worn-out guidebook titled "Mystical Entities of the Northern Woods."

As if on cue, a pair of luminous eyes blinked open from the shadows, reflecting the starlight. Lydia's heart skipped a beat, her fingers tightening around Marcus's sleeve.

"I think it's our chance," Marcus murmured, then slowly stepped forward, offering an open hand with a piece of granola.

The creature emerged, its fur shimmering with ethereal light, a blend of silver and midnight. It sniffed the air, then, with deliberate grace, approached them.

"So... any regrets?" Marcus asked, his voice low and wondrous.

Lydia shook her head, eyes locked on the creature. "None at all," she replied, and for a second, everything felt timeless.

As the sky began to tint with the first hues of dawn, one could imagine this was a tale they’d tell for generations – of the night they met the guardian of the forest and realized some mysteries were meant to be lived, not just discovered.

{}

resume_text:
Sure, here's a piece of random text:

Bob glanced at the peculiar device resting on his workbench. It looked like a contraption from a science fiction movie, with its assortment of blinking lights and faint hum. It was something he had cobbled together over the past few weeks, quite by accident more than design.

Flugelsnoot, his perpetually curious cat, approached the contraption with the kind of curiosity that was both endearing and slightly nerve-wracking. Bob had no idea what this machine did. For all he knew, pressing the big red button might turn Flugelsnoot into a time-traveling kitty. Or maybe nothing would happen at all. Lumping the risk aside, Bob decided it was time to find out.

He took a deep breath, braced himself for any unexpected warp in the fabric of reality, and pressed the button.

Nothing happened.

Slightly disappointed, Bob sighed. But as he was about to turn away, the machine started whirring quietly, and a small door popped open, revealing a steaming mug of perfectly brewed coffee. Bob blinked in disbelief.

"Oh, this is gonna be big," he whispered to Flugelsnoot, who was already perched on the bench, sniffing the aromatic air.

In unrelated news, a giant inflatable rubber duck was seen floating down the city's river today, providing a whimsical break from the morning commute and leaving thousands of onlookers smiling and snapping photos. No one seems to know how the duck got there, but local authorities are investigating.

Meanwhile, back at the workshop, Bob was already jotting down notes for his next invention: an automatic sandwich assembler. As Flugelsnoot rubbed against his leg, probably in dire need of a snack, Bob couldn't help but grin. Who knew what wonders tomorrow might bring?

resume_text:
Sure! Here's a random story for you:

In the quaint village of Willowbrook, nestled between rolling hills and shimmering lakes, an annual event called the "Festival of Quirks" enchanted both young and old. Every year, the townspeople celebrated their quirks and idiosyncrasies with great gusto. This year, the highlight of the festival was a peculiar competition called "Floral Fizz."

The competition required participants to create a sparkling beverage using only flowers and natural ingredients found in the village. Twelve contestants, ranging from the eccentric Professor Glimmer, who claimed to communicate with plants, to young Lily, who dreamt of one day becoming the finest botanist, entered the contest.

The atmosphere was electric as contestants scrambled around the vast village gardens, armed with baskets and determination. Professor Glimmer, sporting his oversized glasses and a flower-topped hat, moved with the grace of someone at one with nature. Meanwhile, Lily, with her ginger curls bouncing, meticulously selected vibrant marigolds and fragrant lavender sprigs.

As the day wore on, the air filled with floral fragrances and the soft hum of laughter and chatter. At twilight, the contestants returned to the village square with their concoctions, each more vibrant than the last. The judges—a panel consisting of the wise Mayor Petunia, the jovial baker Mr. Crumble, and the ever-curious schoolteacher Miss Whimsy—took their time savoring each drink.

In the end, it was young Lily's concoction that triumphed. Her "Lavender Lullaby" captivated the judges with its delicate taste and enchanting aroma. Cheers erupted, and Professor Glimmer, with a twinkle in his eye, congratulated Lily, declaring her the "Botanical Whisperer."

As the festival drew to a close under a canopy of stars, the villagers of Willowbrook danced and toasted to their quirks, ensuring that no matter how peculiar the coming year might be, it would be greeted with open arms and joyous hearts.

And that's the story of the Festival of Quirks and the Floral Fizz competition—where a dash of whimsy and a pinch of nature's magic brought a village together in the most delightful way.

PU E-BUS TRACKING APPLICATION

Android-based project. The application has two modules; one is for drivers, the other for

resume_text:
**Title: Business Development Manager**  

**Company: MarketPros Enterprises**  

**Location: Remote with potential travel to client locations**  

**About Us:**  
MarketPros Enterprises is a leading global provider of innovative business solutions with the aim of maximizing brand growth. We work with diverse industries to enhance their sales infrastructure and provide unparalleled customer engagement strategies.  

**Role Overview:**  
As a Business Development Manager at MarketPros Enterprises, you will be responsible for leading strategic initiatives that drive business growth, increase market share, and strengthen client relationships. You will manage cross-functional teams to implement sales strategies, harness market insights, and drive brand expansion.  

**Key Responsibilities:**  
- Develop and implement comprehensive business strategies to enhance revenue growth.  
- Lead a team in executing marketing campaigns and optimizing sales pipelines.  
- Utilize data analytics tools to produce actionable insights improving overall performance.  
- Conduct market research to identify industry trends and new business opportunities.  
- Engage with potential clients via presentations and foster long-term relationships.  
- Manage CRM systems (Salesforce, HubSpot) to streamline operations and enhance productivity.  

**Preferred Skills:**  
- Proficiency in strategic planning and market analysis.  
- Strong leadership skills with proven experience in team development.  
- Advanced knowledge of CRM software and digital marketing tools.  
- Excellent communication and negotiation skills.  

Join us to push the boundaries of business innovation and help us achieve our expansion goals.

resume_text:
## Job Title: Sales and SEO Management Specialist  

### Location: Lahore, Pakistan  

### Company: Innovate Digital Solutions Inc.  

### Job Summary:  
Join Innovate Digital Solutions Inc. as a Sales and SEO Management Specialist. You will be part of a dynamic team responsible for driving client engagement and ensuring optimal performance in digital marketing strategies. Your role will include managing client relationships, improving SEO strategies, and leading your team to achieve sales targets.  

### Key Responsibilities:  
- Proactively engage with prospective clients to understand their business needs and provide innovative solutions.  
- Design and execute SEO strategies in alignment with client’s marketing objectives.  
- Manage and optimize PPC campaigns to maximize ROI and brand visibility.  
- Develop and maintain strong client relationships through tailored marketing solutions.  
- Lead a team to achieve and surpass sales targets while providing exceptional customer service.  
- Analyze market trends and algorithms to tailor SEO strategies accordingly.  
- Produce reports that track progress and measure success against KPIs.  

### Ideal Candidate Profile:  
You are a skilled sales and marketing professional with strong analytical skills suited to identifying and executing SEO opportunities. You excel at client interactions, possessing the ability to transform potential leads into satisfied clients through strategic and well-executed marketing initiatives. Leadership and team management skills will be pivotal to drive sales and motivate your team.  

### Benefits:  
- Competitive salary package  
- Health and wellness benefits  
- Performance bonuses  
- Opportunities for career advancement  

Join us to redefine digital engagement and lead market strategies with agility and innovation.

### Business Development Executive

**Company:** Innovate Dynamics Ltd.

**Location:** Hyderabad, India

**Role Overview:**
Join Innovate Dynamics Ltd. as a Business Development Executive, where you will play a pivotal role in driving business growth by generating leads and managing key client accounts. Leverage your expertise in economic analysis and marketing strategies to enhance our market presence and build strong client relationships.

**Responsibilities:**
- Develop and execute comprehensive business development plans to achieve company objectives.
- Identify and engage prospective clients across diverse niches, including software development and outsourcing.
- Manage and grow relationships with key accounts to drive long-term success.
- Utilize digital marketing strategies to boost client engagement and retention.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to develop tailored client solutions.
- Utilize LinkedIn Sales Navigator to identify and approach new business leads.

**Qualifications:**
- Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Economics, or related field.
- 3-5 years of experience in business development or related fields.
- Strong proficiency with MS Office Suite and data analysis tools like Stata.
- Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
- Ability to multitask and manage multiple projects simultaneously.

resume_text:
Join **TechVentures Inc.** as a **Senior Project Manager** where you'll oversee the delivery of key data management and analytics projects. We are looking for an innovative leader who can set and uphold delivery standards, while managing cross-functional teams to achieve the highest levels of service excellence. Your expertise in pre-sales, solution architecture, and client relationship management will drive our expansion into new markets and optimize existing processes.

### Key Responsibilities:
- Lead and manage complex data analytics and management projects from inception through completion.
- Develop and implement quality and project management systems to align with organizational goals.
- Coordinate solutions architecture and pre-sales activities, including the preparation of RFPs and EOIs.
- Mentor and guide junior team members in professional development and project execution.
- Engage with clients to deliver tailored business solutions and improve customer satisfaction.
- Collaborate with other departments to identify improvement opportunities and streamline processes.

### Preferred Skills:
- Proficiency in data tools such as PowerBI, Oracle DV, and Tableau.
- Strong understanding of software development methodologies including Agile and SCRUM.
- Demonstrated ability to lead large technical teams and handle stakeholder communications effectively.
- Expertise in business intelligence implementation and enterprise data warehousing.

### Why Join Us?
- Opportunity to work on impactful projects with global reach.
- Collaborative and inclusive work environment.
- Continuous learning and professional development opportunities.

Become a part of a team that values integrity, excellence, and innovation, and help us redefine what's possible in the tech industry.

### Business Development Manager

Join **InnovateCorp** as a Business Development Manager to contribute to our growing team and drive strategic initiatives in the technology services sector. The ideal candidate will leverage their extensive experience in business development, client relations, and project management to expand our market presence and build lasting partnerships.

#### Key Responsibilities:
- Develop and implement strategic business development plans to achieve company goals.
- Lead generation and relationship building with potential clients.
- Oversee client acquisition strategies, including exploration beyond freelance markets.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure smooth project delivery.
- Utilize CRM software for tracking client engagement and development progress.
- Conduct market research to stay abreast of industry trends and inform business strategies.
- Manage and report on business development metrics.

#### Skills and Competencies:
- Strong communication and interpersonal skills for client engagement and collaboration.
- Excellent analytical abilities to inform proposals and strategic decisions.
- Experience with Microsoft Office for documentation and presentations.
- Proficiency in CRM software for managing client relationships.

#### Benefits:
- Competitive salary with bonus incentives.
- Opportunities for professional development and career advancement.
- Health and dental insurance packages.
- Flexible working hours and a positive, team-oriented environment.

resume_text:
### Key Account Manager at LuxoTech Solutions

**Location:** Karachi, Pakistan

**Department:** Sales and Marketing

**Reports to:** Director of Sales

**Role Overview:**
Join LuxoTech Solutions as a Key Account Manager where you will be responsible for managing major accounts in the Retail & Hospitality segments across Pakistan. You will drive sales growth by managing existing accounts and developing strategies for new accounts. Your role will involve coordinating with cross-functional teams, analyzing market trends, and leading initiatives to meet revenue targets.

#### Responsibilities:
- Manage a portfolio of 15+ key accounts, comprising both end-users and channel partners.
- Drive expansion into new market segments by identifying and engaging with potential leads.
- Develop and execute account management strategies to achieve 110% target attainment in revenue.
- Utilize data analysis tools such as Power BI to assess market trends and generate insights.
- Coordinate with internal teams including marketing and operations to ensure strategic alignment.
- Lead contract negotiations and manage pricing strategies to optimize profitability.
- Report on account performance and market opportunities to senior management regularly.

#### Essential Skills:
- Strong leadership and stakeholder management skills.
- Proficiency in data analysis and forecasting to inform decision-making.
- Experience with tools such as Salesforce, Vistex, and SAP ERP for managing sales functions.
- Excellent communication skills for client interactions and internal collaborations.

#### Qualifications:
- Master's degree preferred; Bachelor's degree in Business Administration or related field is required.
- 5+ years of experience in sales management or business development, with a focus on key account management.
- Demonstrated success in growing accounts and achieving revenue targets.

#### Benefits:
- Competitive salary with performance bonuses.
- Professional development opportunities and access to industry seminars.
- Flexible working hours.

resume_text:
Join **TechVentures Inc.** as a **Senior Project Manager** where you'll oversee the delivery of key data management and analytics projects. We are looking for an innovative leader who can set and uphold delivery standards, while managing cross-functional teams to achieve the highest levels of service excellence. Your expertise in pre-sales, solution architecture, and client relationship management will drive our expansion into new markets and optimize existing processes.

### Key Responsibilities:
- Lead and manage complex data analytics and management projects from inception through completion.
- Develop and implement quality and project management systems to align with organizational goals.
- Coordinate solutions architecture and pre-sales activities, including the preparation of RFPs and EOIs.
- Mentor and guide junior team members in professional development and project execution.
- Engage with clients to deliver tailored business solutions and improve customer satisfaction.
- Collaborate with other departments to identify improvement opportunities and streamline processes.

### Preferred Skills:
- Proficiency in data tools such as PowerBI, Oracle DV, and Tableau.
- Strong understanding of software development methodologies including Agile and SCRUM.
- Demonstrated ability to lead large technical teams and handle stakeholder communications effectively.
- Expertise in business intelligence implementation and enterprise data warehousing.

### Why Join Us?
- Opportunity to work on impactful projects with global reach.
- Collaborative and inclusive work environment.
- Continuous learning and professional development opportunities.

Become a part of a team that values integrity, excellence, and innovation, and help us redefine what's possible in the tech industry.

resume_text:
## Join ElectroSolutions as a Senior Electrical Project Manager

### Position Overview

ElectroSolutions, a leading innovative engineering company, is seeking a Senior Electrical Project Manager to lead and oversee our electrical engineering projects from inception to completion. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience in electrical design, project management, and the installation, testing, and commissioning of electrical systems.

### Key Responsibilities
- Lead and manage electrical projects ensuring they meet technical standards and business expectations.
- Coordinate and oversee all project elements, including design, quality planning, and the installation of electrical systems.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams and stakeholders to deliver project outcomes effectively.
- Provide strategic guidance and technical support throughout project execution.
- Enhance team engagement and manage vendor relationships to drive project success.

### Qualifications and Skills
- Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering; Master’s degree in Engineering Management or related field is preferred.
- 10+ years of experience in electrical project management and engineering.
- Strong skills in electrical design evaluation, project management, and team leadership.
- Proficiency in progress reporting and vendor management.
- Excellent communication and analytical skills.
- Ability to manage multiple projects and prioritize tasks effectively.

### What We Offer
- Competitive salary package
- Opportunity to work on cutting-edge engineering projects
- Collaborative work environment 
- Opportunities for professional growth and development

resume_text:
**Title: Business Development Manager**  

**Company: MarketPros Enterprises**  

**Location: Remote with potential travel to client locations**  

**About Us:**  
MarketPros Enterprises is a leading global provider of innovative business solutions with the aim of maximizing brand growth. We work with diverse industries to enhance their sales infrastructure and provide unparalleled customer engagement strategies.  

**Role Overview:**  
As a Business Development Manager at MarketPros Enterprises, you will be responsible for leading strategic initiatives that drive business growth, increase market share, and strengthen client relationships. You will manage cross-functional teams to implement sales strategies, harness market insights, and drive brand expansion.  

**Key Responsibilities:**  
- Develop and implement comprehensive business strategies to enhance revenue growth.  
- Lead a team in executing marketing campaigns and optimizing sales pipelines.  
- Utilize data analytics tools to produce actionable insights improving overall performance.  
- Conduct market research to identify industry trends and new business opportunities.  
- Engage with potential clients via presentations and foster long-term relationships.  
- Manage CRM systems (Salesforce, HubSpot) to streamline operations and enhance productivity.  

**Preferred Skills:**  
- Proficiency in strategic planning and market analysis.  
- Strong leadership skills with proven experience in team development.  
- Advanced knowledge of CRM software and digital marketing tools.  
- Excellent communication and negotiation skills.  

Join us to push the boundaries of business innovation and help us achieve our expansion goals.

resume_text:
## Lead Generation and Business Intelligence Specialist

Join **Innovate Connections Inc.** as a Lead Generation and Business Intelligence Specialist. You will play a pivotal role in driving business growth by spearheading lead generation initiatives and providing strategic insights through data analytics. We are looking for a highly skilled professional with a strong background in lead generation, data management, and business intelligence.

### Key Responsibilities:
- Develop and execute lead generation strategies using digital marketing techniques, cold calling, and data scraping tools.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to optimize customer acquisition strategies.
- Utilize CRM systems to manage and analyze client data for lead qualification.
- Create and manage detailed project schedules and work plans, utilizing best practices and standards for project execution.
- Develop financial models and business growth strategies based on data insights.
- Utilize tools such as Power BI, SQL, and Tableau for developing comprehensive data reports and dashboards.

### Desired Skills and Experience:
- Strong programming skills in C++, HTML, and CSS.
- Proficiency in digital marketing, email marketing, and social media platforms.
- Experience in managing large data sets and using BI tools (Power BI, Excel, Tableau).
- Excellent communication skills and ability to develop strong client relationships.
- Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects simultaneously.

### Why Innovate Connections Inc.?
- We innovate at the forefront of technology and enable our team members to grow alongside the company.
- We value data-driven decision-making and empower our teams with the right tools to succeed.
- Offering a supportive work environment and opportunities for career advancement.

### How to Apply:
Submit your resume and cover letter detailing your relevant experience and why you are interested in joining Innovate Connections Inc.

### Key Account Manager at LuxoTech Solutions

**Location:** Karachi, Pakistan

**Department:** Sales and Marketing

**Reports to:** Director of Sales

**Role Overview:**
Join LuxoTech Solutions as a Key Account Manager where you will be responsible for managing major accounts in the Retail & Hospitality segments across Pakistan. You will drive sales growth by managing existing accounts and developing strategies for new accounts. Your role will involve coordinating with cross-functional teams, analyzing market trends, and leading initiatives to meet revenue targets.

#### Responsibilities:
- Manage a portfolio of 15+ key accounts, comprising both end-users and channel partners.
- Drive expansion into new market segments by identifying and engaging with potential leads.
- Develop and execute account management strategies to achieve 110% target attainment in revenue.
- Utilize data analysis tools such as Power BI to assess market trends and generate insights.
- Coordinate with internal teams including marketing and operations to ensure strategic alignment.
- Lead contract negotiations and manage pricing strategies to optimize profitability.
- Report on account performance and market opportunities to senior management regularly.

#### Essential Skills:
- Strong leadership and stakeholder management skills.
- Proficiency in data analysis and forecasting to inform decision-making.
- Experience with tools such as Salesforce, Vistex, and SAP ERP for managing sales functions.
- Excellent communication skills for client interactions and internal collaborations.

#### Qualifications:
- Master's degree preferred; Bachelor's degree in Business Administration or related field is required.
- 5+ years of experience in sales management or business development, with a focus on key account management.
- Demonstrated success in growing accounts and achieving revenue targets.

#### Benefits:
- Competitive salary with performance bonuses.
- Professional development opportunities and access to industry seminars.
- Flexible working hours.

## Join Our Dynamic Team as a Senior Sales and Marketing Executive

### Position Overview

[Acme Corp], a leader in providing cutting-edge digital marketing solutions, is on the hunt for a driven **Senior Sales and Marketing Executive** to play a key role in our growing team. You’ll leverage your skills in sales management, business development, and digital marketing to drive business growth and maximize client satisfaction. Use your talent in leadership to mentor our young team, ensuring we hit key business targets while setting new standards in the industry.

### Key Responsibilities
- Drive sales strategies to achieve performance targets and expand our market reach.
- Manage end-to-end sales processes including customer prospecting, lead generation, and closing sales. 
- Work collaboratively with the digital marketing team to conceive, manage, and execute marketing campaigns.
- Utilize CRM tools such as HubSpot for tracking and analytics to boost sales efficiency.
- Conduct market research and data analysis to inform business strategies.
- Mentor new hires and facilitate continuous professional development.

### Essential Skills and Experience
- Proven experience in sales management and digital marketing (5+ years preferred).
- Strong command over marketing automation tools and CRMs like HubSpot and Salesforce.
- Ability to set strategic goals with excellent problem-solving and communication skills.
- Aptitude for data visualization and analytics to drive informed marketing decisions.
- Familiarity with SEO, SEM, email marketing campaigns, and business intelligence tools.
- Demonstrated proficiency in leading and supervising a dynamic team environment.

### What We Offer
- Competitive salary and a comprehensive benefits package.
- Opportunity to work with an innovative team and environment.
- Continuous learning opportunities and growth potential within the company.

Join us to make an impact on the digital landscape and drive success!

resume_text:
## Lead Generation and Business Intelligence Specialist

Join **Innovate Connections Inc.** as a Lead Generation and Business Intelligence Specialist. You will play a pivotal role in driving business growth by spearheading lead generation initiatives and providing strategic insights through data analytics. We are looking for a highly skilled professional with a strong background in lead generation, data management, and business intelligence.

### Key Responsibilities:
- Develop and execute lead generation strategies using digital marketing techniques, cold calling, and data scraping tools.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to optimize customer acquisition strategies.
- Utilize CRM systems to manage and analyze client data for lead qualification.
- Create and manage detailed project schedules and work plans, utilizing best practices and standards for project execution.
- Develop financial models and business growth strategies based on data insights.
- Utilize tools such as Power BI, SQL, and Tableau for developing comprehensive data reports and dashboards.

### Desired Skills and Experience:
- Strong programming skills in C++, HTML, and CSS.
- Proficiency in digital marketing, email marketing, and social media platforms.
- Experience in managing large data sets and using BI tools (Power BI, Excel, Tableau).
- Excellent communication skills and ability to develop strong client relationships.
- Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects simultaneously.

### Why Innovate Connections Inc.?
- We innovate at the forefront of technology and enable our team members to grow alongside the company.
- We value data-driven decision-making and empower our teams with the right tools to succeed.
- Offering a supportive work environment and opportunities for career advancement.

### How to Apply:
Submit your resume and cover letter detailing your relevant experience and why you are interested in joining Innovate Connections Inc.

resume_text:
### Digital Marketing Strategist at InnovateTech Corp

**Location:** Lahore, Pakistan  
**Position:** Full-Time  
**Department:** Marketing 

**About Us:**  
InnovateTech Corp is at the forefront of providing integrated digital solutions tailored to drive business success. Our expertise in leveraging technology to enhance branding and market reach sets us apart in the dynamic world of marketing.

**Role Summary:**  
We are seeking a talented and experienced Digital Marketing Strategist to join our team. You will play a crucial role in designing, implementing, and managing digital marketing strategies aligned with our business goals. Your exceptional communication skills and marketing expertise will be pivotal in enhancing our online presence and fostering client relationships.

**Key Responsibilities:**
- Develop, implement, and manage marketing campaigns that promote the company and its products/services.
- Enhance brand awareness in the digital space.
- Drive website traffic and acquire leads/customers.
- Manage social media strategy and presence.
- Coordinate with the sales team to create marketing campaigns.
- Drive strategies to ensure the achievement of marketing targets.

**Skills & Competencies:**
- Strong analytical and project management skills.
- Deep understanding of how all digital marketing channels function.
- Solid knowledge of online marketing tools and best practices.
- Hands-on experience with SEO/SEM, Google Analytics, and CRM software.
- Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
- Strong decision-making and problem-solving skills.
- Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously and work collaboratively.

**Why InnovateTech Corp?**
- Innovative and growth-driven workplace.
- Opportunities for professional development.
- Competitive salary and benefits.

Join us to reshape the future of digital interaction and marketing!

resume_text:
### Join Apex Global Solutions as a Business Development Manager  

Apex Global Solutions is seeking a dedicated Business Development Manager to bolster our B2B sales efforts and enhance our market presence. This role requires a strategic thinker with the ability to forge and maintain robust client relationships, lead market analysis, and drive revenue growth through innovative sales strategies.

#### Key Responsibilities  
- Develop and implement strategic business development plans to meet organizational goals.
- Identify and qualify new business opportunities and partnerships.
- Lead market research to determine new market segments and customer needs.
- Foster long-term relationships with clients through successful engagement and collaboration.
- Track and report on key business metrics, providing insights and data-driven recommendations to executive leadership.
- Collaborate with internal teams to ensure alignment and excellence in service delivery.

#### Required Skills  
- Exceptional communication and interpersonal abilities.
- Proven experience in B2B sales and marketing, particularly in IT and manufacturing sectors.
- Proficient in market research and data analysis.

employment_history.details: Achieved a remarkable YoY revenue growth of 30% in Digital Outsourcing, Digital Transformation, SaaS Platform, ERP solutions, IBM Cloud Products, IoT-based solutions, and Satellite services. Increased lead generation by 35% within the first quarter through targeted marketing campaigns and improved lead nurturing strategies. Achieved a conversion rate of 15% by implementing personalized outreach initiatives based on lead behavior analysis for different segments. Expanded market reach by identifying and entering two new lucrative markets, resulting in a 40% revenue growth within six months. Generated $1.1 million in additional revenue by introducing a new product line for the healthcare industry based on market research and customer demand analysis. Maintained an outstanding 25% customer satisfaction rate through Value-Added analyses. Work closely with our software development team to understand the capabilities and offerings of our company and will be responsible for presenting these to potential clients for revenue growth. Successfully managed multiple projects related to Web/App Development, Resource Augmentation, and Digital Transformation solutions boosting local and international business prospects. Captured 70% market share in the satellite services sector through partner channel sales with Thuraya Telecom, Iridium, SUNMI, and Inmarsat in Pakistan. Developed effective business plans and sales strategies for consistent growth and profitability. Leveraging advanced analytics tools i.e. Zoom info and LinkedIn Sales Navigator for prospecting to track lead behavior and optimize lead nurturing activities for maximum engagement and sales. Provided quarterly cost-benefit analyses report to CEO for optimizing project positioning through Sales Strategy & Leadership. Using ZOHO CRM for lead management and day to day performance analytics. Led the team of Digital Marketing to give them guideline as per target market to design the email Campaigns for lead generation.

Achieved an impressive 15% lead-to-customer conversion rate, showcasing our exceptional sales capabilities through Cold Calling, LinkedIn Outreach and Email Campaigns. Demonstrated a track record of excellence by generating a substantial $500k in revenue annually through successful deals and partnerships and increased 20% every year in total revenue. Established ourselves as a leading IT Consulting firm in Middle East region renowned for our expertise in Web/App development services. Actively involved in pricing the solution/service and responding to RFPs, ensuring competitive offerings, and winning proposals through Upwork and Fiverr. Expertise in a wide range of fields, including Software Development, Accounting & Financial Solutions, E-commerce Solutions, and Virtual Resources guaranteeing comprehensive support to our clients. Utilize cutting-edge tools like Apollo and HubSpot to drive effective lead generation and customer acquisition strategies for more revenue. Play a pivotal role in facilitating meetings between clients and our practice leaders, ensuring seamless communication, and understanding of client needs. Identify and seize new business opportunities through extensive research and networking efforts, staying ahead in a competitive market. Employ continuous follow-up via emails and calls, ensuring we meet and exceed sales targets consistently by collaborating directly with customers, sales, and cross-functional teams. Conduct engaging and persuasive product presentations and demonstrations to the clients, showcasing the innovation and effectiveness of our offerings.

Maintained of relationship with the US Doctors, Practice owners and insurance companies. Record keeping of all the uncollected liens and Manage report. Responsible for negotiating the medical bills with insurance company to close the cases through outbound calls and emails. Responsible to submit the appeals and objections on denied cases via e-mails and e-Fax. Verifying the patient and justify his medical history in the light of Worker compensation law for bill payments. Follow-up, collection, and monitoring of accounts receivable. Respond to insurance rep inquiries relating to invoicing and other related requests. Maintain client credit notes and agreements with collection process. Reporting of monthly & quarterly billing of assigned tasks. Follow-up & escalation with regional & HQ teams for assigned tasks. Coordination with 3rd party/vendors attorneys to collect the bills as well.

employment_history.details: Lead and managed the business development department to generate leads converting to clients, sought out different avenues for business growth, and increased the digital presence of the company.
Creation and optimization of IT, social media, mobile and web development & customer support profiles. Training the team on the operating platforms and generating leads through LinkedIn and Upwork.

Created the company profiles and portfolios from scratch for platforms like Upwork, Fiverr & LinkedIn. Managed client communication and sales closing, delivering $5000 worth of recurring project revenue.
Team training on platforms like Upwork and LinkedIn. Delivered $11,000 worth of recurring revenue and upsold the client, increasing project revenue to $30,000/month.
Managed the entire profiling and bidding process on platforms like Upwork, Fiverr, Freelancer, Guru. Delivered $15,000 worth of recurring project revenue in the 4th quarter.
Provided customer support for a variety of US projects including e-commerce stores and Airbnb hosts.
Provided support via emails for Careem customers and handled email tickets through Zendesk.

Conducted anonymous market visits to get the primary insights of the current market/competition situation. Hands on command on Vistex Tool, trained the PMs in Pakistan on the use of Vistex. Communicating with the Marcom team regarding the ongoing and upcoming campaigns. Increased profitability by 10% by forecasting channel sales and IGM with 95% accuracy. Improved decision making by providing comprehensive weekly performance reports to the commercial head, resulting in a 20% improvement.

Coordinated national sales for professional lighting, resulting in 15% sales growth. Improved sales team productivity by 20% as key user for Sales Force Dot Com. employment_history.details: Building positive relationships with customers, promoting the company’s products/services, keeping records of sales, revenue, invoices, and providing after-sales support.
Developing a growth strategy focused on financial gain and customer satisfaction, conducting research to identify new markets, and arranging business meetings with prospective clients.
Developing a growth strategy focused on financial gain and customer satisfaction, conducting research to identify new markets, and arranging business meetings with prospective clients.
Building positive relationships with customers and assisting with generating new business.
Handling accounts payable and receivable, maintaining records of business costs, and checking invoices for inaccuracies.
Administering all accounts and budgets for various departments, performing audits on tax, and preparing reports for SEC.

executive_summary: Muhammad Shoaib Ameen is a dedicated professional with extensive experience in project and relationship management across various sectors, demonstrating a strong commitment to building positive client relationships and driving business growth.

employment_history.details: Identifying new business opportunities and potential clients through market research, networking, and lead generation. Developing and executing business strategies to improve efficiency and workflows. Leading market research to identify expansion opportunities in new regions, resulting in plans to open new offices. Providing data-driven strategic recommendations to senior management based on competitive analysis. Monitoring industry trends and competitive landscapes to stay ahead of market developments and identifying potential areas for innovation and growth.
Supported a team of 7 digital marketers in developing social media marketing campaigns for international and local businesses. Gained exposure to influencer marketing and Facebook/Instagram ads.

Launched an Amazon dropshipping store in the USA, sourced from Walmart, managed deliveries. Achieved 150% ROI in the very first month. Implemented effective pricing strategies, including psychological pricing, to attract and drive sales. Consistently secured Amazon's 'Buy Box', winning it multiple times for excellent seller performance.

Created 50+ blog posts and informative articles for international clients across industries. Completed a few projects to help SMEs in their global market research. Cultivated strong client relationships and achieved a 100% job success score.

Contributed to a significant reduction in workforce size, with nearly 2000 employees opting for the VSS, leading to enhanced operational agility and cost savings for the organization. Assisted in conducting exit interviews for departing employees, gathering valuable feedback to identify areas for improvement within the organization.

Founded and operated an e-commerce store on Daraz.pk in 2021. Successfully launched a single product, achieving sales of over 1000 units within 4 months. Efficiently recouped the initial investment in just 2 months, demonstrating strong business acumen. Implemented various marketing techniques, including Facebook ads, VVRs (Verified and Validated Reviews Optimization), giveaways, vouchers, and bulk discounts to drive sales and attract customers. Effectively utilized social media platforms and promotions to increase brand visibility and customer engagement.

Co-authored a comprehensive and compelling business plan that resulted in a successful win for the company, showcasing critical thinking, market analysis, and strategic vision. Spearheaded presentations and discussions on the optimal allocation of the investment within the software sector. Collaborated with cross-functional teams to identify high-potential opportunities, cost-saving initiatives, and growth strategies.

achievements: Achieved 150% ROI in the very first month of launching an Amazon dropshipping store.
Secured vital sponsorship for the prestigious International Moot Court Competition through exceptional negotiation and communication skills.
executive_summary: Hamza Ahmad is a dedicated business development executive with a strong background in marketing and sales. He has demonstrated expertise in Google Analytics, SEO, and influencer marketing, contributing to significant business growth and client engagement. Hamza is committed to delivering data-driven solutions that meet client needs and drive success.

Communicated marketing strategy to verify alignment with senior management objectives. Worked with internal teams to ensure the timely and accurate delivery of marketing materials and assets. Directed marketing plans for 15+ clients, proactively servicing needs, maintaining satisfaction, and consistently achieving profit goals.

Managed customer complaints and inquiries, providing timely and effective solutions that exceeded their expectations and improved overall satisfaction. Achieved daily target of converting 20 detractors into promoters of the company. Collaborated with internal teams, such as technical support and billing, to address customer concerns and ensure timely and effective solutions.

Defused customer concerns with exceptional conflict and problem-resolution skills. Managed over 200 above-customer calls per day. Consistently met or exceeded key performance indicators, such as call volume, handle time, and customer satisfaction scores.

employment_history.details: Maintained strong relationships with clients and identified new opportunities for growth and expansion. Communicated marketing strategy to verify alignment with senior management objectives. Worked with internal teams to ensure the timely and accurate delivery of marketing materials and assets. Directed marketing plans for 15+ clients, proactively servicing needs, maintaining satisfaction, and consistently achieving profit goals.

Managed customer complaints and inquiries, providing timely and effective solutions that exceeded their expectations and improved overall satisfaction. Achieved daily target of converting 20 detractors into promoters of the company. Collaborated with internal teams, such as technical support and billing, to address customer concerns and ensure timely and effective solutions.

Defused customer concerns with exceptional conflict and problem-resolution skills. Managed over 200 above-customer calls per day. Consistently met or exceeded key performance indicators, such as call volume, handle time, and customer satisfaction scores.

employment_history.details: Contacting potential clients to establish rapport and arrange meetings. Planning and overseeing new marketing initiatives. Researching organizations and individuals to find new opportunities. Increasing the value of current customers while attracting new ones. Finding and developing new markets and improving sales. Attending conferences, meetings, and industry events. Developing quotes and proposals for clients. Developing goals for the development team and business growth and ensuring they are met. Training personnel and helping team members develop their skills. Forecasted factors such as sales numbers and product profitability to determine ideal strategies.

Contacting potential clients to establish rapport and arrange meetings. Planning and overseeing new marketing initiatives. Researching organizations and individuals to find new opportunities. Increasing the value of current customers while attracting new ones. Finding and developing new markets and improving sales. Attending conferences, meetings, and industry events. Developing quotes and proposals for clients. To schedule client interviews for shortlisted resources and obtain post interview feedback. To meet and counsel daily absenteeism employees along with the welfare and forward the report to HRC for the disciplinary action. To supervise project deployment and ensure smooth running of projects with zero client complaints. To ensure resources report on duty for projects and maintain grooming standards. Brief employees prior to deployment -to reduce the work refusal etc. for any new clients. Follow up with CRT team with regards to new joiner emergency leave status. Prepare and collect the resume for the list of the skill claimed employees and schedule them for the test with concern dept. Maintain records of new site inspection reports along with risk assessment report. Prepare list of the clients with past data for best employee nomination award.

Managing daily operational activities & logistics requirements. Designing Standard Operations Procedures (SOP’s) for complex tasks & evaluate them by their performance. Establish objectives and strategies in regard to operational structure, competition and pricing of projects. Design and negotiate financial solutions, and demonstrate relevant effective management techniques. Analyze and identify needs for logistics and trade services, shipping and other transport modes. Develop logistical plans, policies, and procedures necessary to provide support in the Operational areas of supply, Logistics, transportation, maintenance, and services. Taking decisions in difficult situations, in response to bad weather conditions, security alerts or industrial relations problems. Meets cost standards by monitoring expenses; implementing cost-saving actions. Updates job knowledge by participating in educational opportunities; reading professional publications. Enhances department and organization reputation by accepting ownership for accomplishing new and different requests; exploring opportunities to add value to job accomplishments.

Take instructions provided by manager and complete required tasks. Screen and handle telephone calls and manage enquiries. Manage post, emails and faxes, issuing responses where possible. Act as a main point of contact. Assist managers with meetings and arrange logistics, such as travel and accommodation. Undertake research and produce documents for meetings. Produce letters and, if necessary, reports on behalf of your manager. Oversee office procedures. Oversee some aspects of finances, manage an office team and supervise project work. Manage personal diaries and undertake other non-work-related errands. To prepare MIS Reports for improve quality in service performance.

executive_summary: Waqas Zulfiqar is a seasoned sales and management professional with over 10 years of experience in business development and operations management. He possesses a strong technical background with certifications in networking and cybersecurity, demonstrating a commitment to leveraging technology for business growth. Waqas has a proven track record in client relations and project management, making him a valuable asset to any progressive organization.

employment_history.details: Utilized LinkedIn Sales Navigator, ZoomInfo, and Apollo.io to identify and extract potential leads, expanding the prospect database. Executed targeted outbound email campaigns and conducted cold calls, resulting in a 35% increase in lead engagement and qualified leads. Managed a portfolio of over 200 client accounts, exceeding monthly sales quotas. Proactively identified and pursued new business opportunities, driving expansion of the sales pipeline and contributing to revenue growth. Consistently surpassed monthly targets, achieving a track record of excellence in generating qualified leads and opportunities, positioning as a consistent top performer. Expertly managed client data using Salesforce, ensuring meticulous logging of all communications, maintaining accurate information, and diligently attaching relevant documents for streamlined operations.

Surpassed monthly outbound call targets consistently, driving a significant increase in lead generation and prospect engagement. Successfully identified and qualified high-value leads, resulting in a substantial boost in the sales pipeline and contributing to revenue growth. Developed and implemented a highly effective outbound email campaign.

Designed and developed a complete and effective business plan focusing on budgeting, forecasting, financial analysis, and determining expected returns. Managed a workforce of over 20 employees with strict reward and retention policies. Effectively developing and implementing sales strategies to overcome shortcomings.

employment_history.details: Achieved a remarkable YoY revenue growth of 30% in Digital Outsourcing, Digital Transformation, SaaS Platform, ERP solutions, IBM Cloud Products, IoT-based solutions, and Satellite services. Increased lead generation by 35% within the first quarter through targeted marketing campaigns and improved lead nurturing strategies. Achieved a conversion rate of 15% by implementing personalized outreach initiatives based on lead behavior analysis for different segments. Expanded market reach by identifying and entering two new lucrative markets, resulting in a 40% revenue growth within six months. Generated $1.1 million in additional revenue by introducing a new product line for the healthcare industry based on market research and customer demand analysis. Maintained an outstanding 25% customer satisfaction rate through Value-Added analyses. Work closely with our software development team to understand the capabilities and offerings of our company and will be responsible for presenting these to potential clients for revenue growth. Successfully managed multiple projects related to Web/App Development, Resource Augmentation, and Digital Transformation solutions boosting local and international business prospects. Captured 70% market share in the satellite services sector through partner channel sales with Thuraya Telecom, Iridium, SUNMI, and Inmarsat in Pakistan. Developed effective business plans and sales strategies for consistent growth and profitability. Leveraging advanced analytics tools i.e. Zoom info and LinkedIn Sales Navigator for prospecting to track lead behavior and optimize lead nurturing activities for maximum engagement and sales. Provided quarterly cost-benefit analyses report to CEO for optimizing project positioning through Sales Strategy & Leadership. Using ZOHO CRM for lead management and day to day performance analytics. Led the team of Digital Marketing to give them guideline as per target market to design the email Campaigns for lead generation.

Achieved an impressive 15% lead-to-customer conversion rate, showcasing our exceptional sales capabilities through Cold Calling, LinkedIn Outreach and Email Campaigns. Demonstrated a track record of excellence by generating a substantial $500k in revenue annually through successful deals and partnerships and increased 20% every year in total revenue. Established ourselves as a leading IT Consulting firm in Middle East region renowned for our expertise in Web/App development services. Actively involved in pricing the solution/service and responding to RFPs, ensuring competitive offerings, and winning proposals through Upwork and Fiverr. Expertise in a wide range of fields, including Software Development, Accounting & Financial Solutions, E-commerce Solutions, and Virtual Resources guaranteeing comprehensive support to our clients. Utilize cutting-edge tools like Apollo and HubSpot to drive effective lead generation and customer acquisition strategies for more revenue. Play a pivotal role in facilitating meetings between clients and our practice leaders, ensuring seamless communication, and understanding of client needs. Identify and seize new business opportunities through extensive research and networking efforts, staying ahead in a competitive market. Employ continuous follow-up via emails and calls, ensuring we meet and exceed sales targets consistently by collaborating directly with customers, sales, and cross-functional teams. Conduct engaging and persuasive product presentations and demonstrations to the clients, showcasing the innovation and effectiveness of our offerings.

Maintained of relationship with the US Doctors, Practice owners and insurance companies. Record keeping of all the uncollected liens and Manage report. Responsible for negotiating the medical bills with insurance company to close the cases through outbound calls and emails. Responsible to submit the appeals and objections on denied cases via e-mails and e-Fax. Verifying the patient and justify his medical history in the light of Worker compensation law for bill payments. Follow-up, collection, and monitoring of accounts receivable. Respond to insurance rep inquiries relating to invoicing and other related requests. Maintain client credit notes and agreements with collection process. Reporting of monthly & quarterly billing of assigned tasks. Follow-up & escalation with regional & HQ teams for assigned tasks. Coordination with 3rd party/vendors attorneys to collect the bills as well.

employment_history.details: Researched, interviewed, and analyzed the collected data regarding the potential demand for the Interpon brand of AkzoNobel and the powder coating requirements of Consumer Electronics manufacturers. Provided actionable insights to AkzoNobel regarding exploring the powder coating vertical.

Developed emergency evacuation plans for ten Fatima Groups warehouses located in North Zone of Pakistan to reduce the safety incidents that might affect more than 20 employees. Conducted training of the 10 Warehouse officers in collaboration with HSE department to ensure implementation of the evacuation plan. Observed and Conducted audits of the warehouse operations.

Led a team of five people to conduct research regarding the reduction of sales of PEL appliances in the major appliance market of Lahore and proposed possible solutions to improve the sales. Conducted routine visits to the retailers to understand the challenges faced by the retailers.

Performed in depth analysis of the cooling tower that resulted in 14% cost savings in terms of chemical dosing in the cooling tower. Worked as Shift lead managing a team of 12 people on the field, performed routine tasks such as preparation of work permits and reporting of daily status and maintenance activities on SAP. Conducted Weekly Safety talks with the shift operators on how to perform tasks in accordance with the HSE principles. Conducted training sessions for the 12 Non-Management Associates and 4 Summer Interns.

executive_summary: Hassan Ishaq is a dedicated professional with 5 years of experience in the FMCG industry, specializing in distribution sales. He holds a Master's degree in Economics and has completed various certifications in finance and digital marketing. Hassan is proficient in several software tools including MS Office, G-suite, CRM, Salesforce, and ERP Software, making him a valuable asset in sales and marketing operations.
